command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
sed -n '1709,1847p' runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py
echo '=PAC_TICK='
sed -n '1,100p' runtime/phase_advancement_controller.py
echo '=PAC_RECONCIL='
grep -n 'def _reconcile\|def tick\|def _check\|def start_job\|def _launch\|def _notify\|def _stale\|frozen\|lease\|heartbeat\|duplicate\|attempt_id\|attempt\b\|lifecycle\|worker_pid\|acknowledged' runtime/phase_advancement_controller.py | head -50
ENDSSH
